emails.subject: 4/11 Checkout
emails.body: 4/11 Checkout BLOOMBERG all o.k. PREBON WEST Matt Motley I am missing the following: 1) Enron buys from Williams 25 mw SP Q4'02 at $81.00 2) Enron buys from Allegheny 25 mw PV Q4'01 at $199 3) Enron sells Avista 25mw PV Q4'01 at $199 AMEREX WEST Chris Mallory I am missing the following deal: Enron buys from AEP 25 mw May SP-15 light at $172.00
